description_long: This is a modern athletic sneaker featuring a predominantly white mesh upper with subtle gray patterning for breathability and style. The shoe has a sculpted, streamlined silhouette with a slightly raised heel and a black accent on the rear sole, providing both visual contrast and additional support. The lacing system is prominent, with thick, white laces threaded through reinforced eyelets, ensuring a secure fit. The midsole appears to be made of lightweight foam, designed for comfort and shock absorption during urban activities. The outsole is only partially visible but seems to offer moderate grip suitable for city surfaces. Overall, the shoe is clean, well-constructed, and designed for both performance and casual wear in urban environments.
description: A sleek, white athletic sneaker with gray mesh patterning, thick white laces, and a black heel accent, designed for comfort and style in urban settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the white mesh upper, thick laces, and prominent black heel accent.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the black heel accent and the vertical pull tab at the back.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the mesh pattern and the sculpted midsole.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the lacing system and the rounded toe box.
